hooks.command: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || cd "/d/econ-wiki" 2>/dev/null || cd "d:/econ-wiki" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; CHANGES="$(git status --porcelain -- sources wiki datasets index.md log.md CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -z "$CHANGES" ]; then exit 0; fi; for p in sources wiki datasets index.md log.md CLAUDE.md; do [ -e "$p" ] && git add "$p"; done; git commit -m "Auto-sync wiki updates ($(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC'))" >/dev/null 2>&1; git push origin main >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
